archetype: Archetype 7: Electric & Neon mixed with Archetype 4: Swiss Brutalist

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-bold text-white

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: p-6, p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24, p-32. Containers with borders MUST have internal padding.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. Prioritize asymmetry. Use wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12).

components.buttons: Flat solid surfaces. Primary CTA ('Get in Touch') should use a gradient background (from pink #ff1493 to indigo #4b0082) with white text. Hover states must have a slight lift (-translate-y-1) and a subtle colored shadow.
components.cards: Avoid standard Shadcn cards. Use cardless layouts or deep black (#0a0a0a) rectangular containers with a subtle 1px border (border-white/10) and no border-radius or max 8px border-radius.
components.navigation: Sticky compact navbar. Use 'Crystal Glass' effect: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with a 1px border-white/10 on the bottom. Z-index 50.
components.hero_blob: Create a 3D interactive animated blob using framer-motion (rotating blurred gradient meshes) OR React Three Fiber + Drei. The blob should use gradients of pink (#ff1493), violet (#8A2BE2), and indigo (#4b0082) against the dark background (#0a0a0a).
components.services_carousel: Place INSIDE the hero section, below the headline. Use react-fast-marquee. Make the text an 'Editorial Ribbon' or 'Kinetic Texture' with large outline text and massive gaps (gap-24) between items.
components.explore_now_button: Place below the carousel. Must trigger a smooth scroll to the next section.

animations.scrolling: Lenis smooth scrolling is highly recommended for a premium feel.
animations.interactions: Hover states on all interactive elements. Click/press states. Staggered fade-up entrances for grids using framer-motion.

case_study_dashboard.description: Live D2C dashboard case study with neon pink/indigo visuals

case_study_ai.description: Property management AI assistant case study

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to a dark-mode only theme (#0a0a0a background). Do not include a theme toggler.
Build the 3D animated hero blob. You may use a layered CSS/framer-motion blur approach for simplicity, or R3F if you prefer, placing it behind the main hero text.
The hero text MUST be exactly: 'Your story, our code – together, we build digital legacies that last'.
Integrate the Services Carousel (infinite scroll) WITHIN the hero section below the main text.
Add the 'Explore Now' button at the bottom of the hero section with smooth scrolling to the 'Our Expertise' section.
Structure the 'Our Expertise' section using the Bento Grid/Tetris Grid layout for the 5 categories.
Structure the 'How We Work' section as a clear process flow.
Showcase the 'Case Studies' portfolio using the provided generated images.
Leave the Contact section minimal as an empty placeholder.
Ensure the Footer includes the DevBroz logo, nav links, and social icons (Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
Use @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react for all iconography.
